Summary description for SolverParameters.

Gets or Sets Maximum value of outer iterations for the solver.
            The default value is 200.

Enables or disables the 2nd law of thermodynamics violation check.
            If enabled and there is a violation, then the solver returns Failure, even if the actual calculation was successful (but it would be wrong).

Inlet tube mass flow rate initialization method to be used in Mass-Flow-Based General Solver iterations.
            Future use.

Flag to skip populating the detailed Tube and Segment results
            This is useful for speeding up large parametric analyses and potentially reducing some memory usage.

Gets or Sets the flag for bypassing the JTA validation.
            This flag is used for performing only the geometry related calculations in the solver.
            This is a temporary solution until we can isolate ALL geometry related calculations outside the solver classes.

Get or Set a logical flag to enable detailed runtime checks.
            As of 201605, this is for future use.
            Detailed runtime checks can be time consuming and this flag allows one to disable them.
            Meant to be used during debugging while working with APIs.

Flag to enable or disable HTC smoothing between two phase and single phase.
            Only certain solvers support this feature. Solvers prior to 2017 do not.
            Deafult is false.

Flag to enable or disable pressure drop smoothing between two phase and single phase.
            Only certain solvers support this feature. Solvers prior to 2017 do not.
            Deafult is false.

This flag enables the calculation of gravity-related pressure drop in U-bends in tube-fin heat exchangers.
            This can be set to false for backward compatibility/reproducibility.
            Default value is false.
            Not all solvers support this capability.

This flag enables the calculation of gravity head in microchannel heat exchangers.
            Added for future use. Not all solvers will support this capability.
            Default value is false.

Quality limit used in HTC smoothing on the liquid side.
            Default limit is 0.2.
